CoursesPage.title: Educational Courses
CoursesPage.subtitle: Choose a course for your professional and personal growth
CoursesPage.charitySubtitle: Courses we provide free of charge for everyone

support.title: Curator Support
support.desc: You are not alone in the process

psychology.title: Foundations of Psychology
psychology.description: An introduction to biblical therapy: healing on three levels — spirit, soul, and body. Tools for helping yourself and others in crisis situations.

psychiatry.title: Foundations of Psychiatry
psychiatry.description: Introduction to psychiatry for psychologists and pastoral counselors

mentorship.title: Foundations of Pastoral Care
mentorship.description: Learn the basics of pastoral care and counseling for those who want to help others in need.

biblicalHeroes.title: Psychotherapy of Biblical Heroes
biblicalHeroes.description: A fresh look at familiar biblical stories. The heroes of the Bible — not perfect, but real.

sexEd.title: Sex Education
sexEd.description: A course on the fundamentals of sex education for parents and educators. How to talk to children and what the Bible says.

support.title: Care Space
support.description: Free psychological support and an opportunity to meet psychologists and pastoral counselors of the UIMP consultation center.

porn.title: Living Pure
porn.description: A specialized course on overcoming pornography addiction

MissionSection.title: Mission.
MissionSection.subtitle: Three vectors that determine the direction of the Ukrainian Institute of Ministry and Psychotherapy
MissionSection.m1title: To bring a person to healing through the revelation of his or her true identity in God
MissionSection.m1i1: to undergo healing on three levels: body, soul and spirit
MissionSection.m1i2: to show the incompleteness of healing the soul without healing the spirit and the importance of the body
MissionSection.m1i3: show a person a healthy need for community
MissionSection.m2title: To show psychology in its original form
MissionSection.m2i1: to reveal pastoral care as an integral part of psychology, to convey the scientific importance of pastoral care
MissionSection.m2i2: to show the scientific relationship between healing the soul and the spirit
MissionSection.m3title: Tear the veil between the church and the world
MissionSection.m3i1: to give the world true knowledge about the church and Christianity
MissionSection.m3i2: teach churches to accept different people, to return the focus from a person's actions to the value of their true identity
MissionSection.m3i3: bring real knowledge of psychology to churches and show its importance on the path to human salvation
MissionSection.m3i4: by spreading psychological education, use psychology to save people
